creator: faber@ISI.EDU
text:
On Thu, Mar 15, 2007 at 08:10:21AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of games/klondike,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/110325 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/110325

This looks fine to me.

-- 
Ted Faber
